name: freezeops
description: Guardrails for AI-assisted development — deterministic safety rules for sensitive codebases

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tanguito/freezeops-core && npm run build -w @tanguito/freezeops
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tanguito/freezeops-core && npm run typecheck -w @tanguito/freezeops
scripts.validate: npm run build -w @tanguito/freezeops-core && npm run typecheck && npm run build -w @tanguito/freezeops
